message:
refactor: Simplify ctypes, sys, fcntl, urllib_request modules with h.wrap/h.pass

- Replace genPtr/genUnaryOp with h.wrap() in ctypes_mod
- Replace genGetsizeof/genIntern/genDisplayhook with h.wrap/h.pass/h.debugPrint in sys_mod
- Inline genOctal with h.c() in fcntl_mod
- Replace genPassthrough with h.pass() in urllib_request_mod

Lines: 6313 → 6286 (-27 lines)
